title: Population genomics and epigenomics of Spirodela polyrhiza provide insights into the evolution of facultative asexuality.
author: Wang Y Duchen P Chavez A Sree KS Appenroth KJ Zhao H Hofer M Huber M Xu S
content: S-EPMC11099151 PMC11099151 Population genomics and epigenomics of Spirodela polyrhiza provide insights into the evolution of facultative asexuality. Many plants are facultatively asexual, balancing short-term benefits with long-term costs of asexuality. During range expansion, natural selection
